system.descriptor: Awareness reflects a character's ability to notice subtle clues and detect hidden threats using their senses.
system.uses:
Uses: Spotting ambushes, detecting hidden enemies, noticing important details, searching an area, eavesdropping on conversations.
Special Use: Lip Reading: With a successful Awareness test at -20, a character can read the lips of anyone they can clearly see. This requires a clear line of sight and the target must be speaking a language the character knows.

description.value: Awareness reflects a character's ability to notice subtle clues and detect hidden threats using their senses.
